description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named LuxCore Python Wheels Publisher that publishes a release to PyPI or PyPI test. The workflow should be triggered manually with a workflow dispatch event, accepting a release tag and a test flag as inputs. Use an ubuntu-latest job with permissions to read repository contents and write ID tokens, and environment variables for PyPI repository URL. Download wheels from a release with the given tag, then publish the package distributions to either PyPI test or PyPI based on the test flag.
